message:
feat(metal): add GPU hash table for GROUP BY and Hash JOIN

Add Metal GPU kernels and Zig wrapper for hash table operations:
- hash_table_build: Parallel insertion with linear probing
- hash_table_probe: Parallel key lookup
- hash_table_extract: Extract all key-value pairs
- radix_histogram/radix_scatter: For radix partitioning

GPUHashTable Zig wrapper with:
- Automatic GPU/CPU dispatch based on batch size
- FNV-1a hashing for 64-bit keys
- Aggregation support (same key values are summed)
- Auto-resizing when load factor > 0.7

This enables GPU-accelerated GROUP BY and Hash JOIN operations.
